---
title: "Chapter 5: Transcendental Functions and Their Inverses"
---

Welcome to Chapter 5! 

Use the links below to download the printable PDF packets.

### For Students
Print this blank packet to bring to class.

 * [📄 Download Blank Student Notes](Chapter-5-Student-Notes.pdf) 


### For Parents & Review
Use this completed packet to check your work or review missed lectures. 

 * [📝 Download Completed Teacher Notes](Chapter-5-Teacher-Notes.pdf)
